title: cinnagrostis tarmensis
intro: Cinnagrostis tarmensis, also known as Sichuan wormwood, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae and is native to the mountainous regions of Sichuan province in China. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cinnagrostis tarmensis include its potential to aid in digestive issues, alleviate symptoms of fever and flu, and reduce inflammation and pain. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil for its medicinal uses, and its essential oil is also extracted for use in aromatherapy and as a natural insect repellent.
